retry_reason: The only failure case is when state is NULL or ERR_PTR, which indicates an invalid or already released object; retrying with the same pointer would yield the same result.
contract_summary: This function is a put wrapper that releases one reference on a struct msm_gpu_state. If the passed state pointer is NULL or an error pointer, it safely returns 1 without modifying any refcount. Otherwise, it calls kref_put, which decrements the embedded kref and invokes adreno_gpu_state_kref_destroy when the count reaches zero. After calling this function, the caller must not use the state object, as it may have been freed. The return value (1 if freed, 0 otherwise) can be used for cleanup decisions but is optional to check.
